zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Percy於大約1141年出生在英國越可爾吉爾達爾時，他的父親Robert de Percy48歲，母親Agnes of Yorkshire43歲。他於大約1166年與Cecily de Mumby在英國英格蘭越可爾博爾頓 珀西結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年9月29日在英國越可爾吉斯波洛享年64歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Percy于大约1141年出生在英国越可爾吉爾達爾时，他的父亲Robert de Percy48岁，母亲Agnes of Yorkshire43岁。他于大约1166年与Cecily de Mumby在英国英格兰越可爾博爾頓 珀西结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年9月29日在英国越可爾吉斯波洛享年64岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Percy was born about 1141, in Kildale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Percy, was 48 and his mother, Agnes of Yorkshire, was 43. He married Cecily de Mumby about 1166, in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 September 1204, in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Percy est né environ 1141, à Kildale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Percy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Yorkshire, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Mumby environ 1166, à Bolton Percy, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1204, à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Percy um 1141 in Kildale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Percy 48 und seine Mutter Agnes of Yorkshire 43. Er hat um 1166 in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Cecily de Mumby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. September 1204 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Percyが約1141年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルダルで生まれた時，父Robert de Percyは48歳，母Agnes of Yorkshireは43歳であった。約1166年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ペルシでCecily de Mumbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年9月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウで64歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Percy(이)가 대략 1141년 영국 요르크실르 킬데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Percy(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes of Yorkshire(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에서 Cecily de Mumby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 9월 29일 영국 요르크실르 길스버루그h에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Percy nasceu aproximadamente 1141, em Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Percy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Yorkshire, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Mumby aproximadamente 1166, em Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1204, em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Percy родился около 1141 г. в местности каилдеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Percy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Yorkshire, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Mumby около 1166 г. в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 сентября 1204 г. в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.
